name: DigitalOcean Spaces
description: DigitalOcean Spaces — S3-compatible object storage with built-in CDN. $5/month base subscription includes 250GB storage + 1TB outbound transfer per Space; overage at $0.02/GB storage and $0.01/GB egress. Bucket-scoped REST with AWS SigV4 against {region}.digitaloceanspaces.com (note: no s3. prefix). Regions: nyc3, ams3, sgp1, fra1, sfo3, syd1. Generate Spaces access keys at cloud.digitalocean.com → API → Spaces Keys.

credential_fields.name: region
credential_fields.label: Region
credential_fields.description: Spaces datacenter — nyc3, ams3, sgp1, fra1, sfo3, or syd1. Each Space lives in exactly one region; check the Space's overview page to confirm.

credential_fields.name: access_key_id
credential_fields.label: Spaces Access Key
credential_fields.description: From cloud.digitalocean.com → API → Spaces Keys → Generate New Key. Spaces keys are account-wide; DO does not support per-Space scoping yet.

credential_fields.name: secret_access_key
credential_fields.label: Spaces Secret Key
credential_fields.description: Shown once at key creation. Regenerate the key if lost.

tools.name: list_objects
tools.description: List objects in a Space (S3-compatible ListObjectsV2). Returns XML; parse Contents[].Key / Size / LastModified, plus IsTruncated + NextContinuationToken for pagination.

prefix.description: Filter to keys starting with this prefix.

continuation-token.description: Pagination cursor from a prior IsTruncated response.

tools.name: put_object
tools.description: Upload an object. Pass content as 'body'; runner sends verbatim with SigV4 integrity hash. Spaces caps single PUT at 5GB; use multipart for larger.

body.description: Object content. Bytes welcome — the runner sends them verbatim.

tools.name: get_object
tools.description: Download an object. Response body is the raw object bytes (response cap 200MB). For public objects, prefer the CDN edge URL ({space}.{region}.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com) over signed reads.

tools.name: delete_object
tools.description: Delete a single object. Returns 204 on success.

tools.name: list_buckets
tools.description: List all Spaces the access key can see. Returns XML; ListAllMyBucketsResult.Buckets.Bucket[] has names + creation dates.
